title: Ryyk (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''Ryyk''' may refer to:

*[[Ryyk]], the planet
*[[Ryyk (Wookiee)|Ryyk]], a Wookiee
*[[Ryyk blade]]
**the [[Ryyk blade/Legends|Legends version]] of the above
*[[Ryyk Nebula/Legends|Ryyk Nebula]]
*the [[Reek/Legends#Kashyyykian reek|ryyk]], the Wookiee name for the Kashyyykian reek
{{Disambig}}
